title: GPT-6 Is Launching Into a World OpenAI No Longer Controls
summary: A video essay analyzes leaked GPT-6 rumors and OpenAI's competitive position, arguing that Microsoft, Apple, and Google have moved away from OpenAI while GPT-5.5 shipped instead of GPT-6. The piece covers big tech partnerships, benchmark rankings, and claims about OpenAI's financial and legal challenges.
writeup: This video essay from AI Master examines leaked rumors about GPT-6 alongside an argument that OpenAI's competitive position has weakened, noting that GPT-5.5 shipped in place of GPT-6 and that Microsoft, Apple, and Google have moved away from OpenAI. It matters because it frames the next flagship model as arriving amid eroding big tech partnerships rather than dominance. Key points include shifting big tech alliances, benchmark rankings, and claims about OpenAI's financial and legal challenges, with reference to test-time compute, LLMs, and memory systems.
